projects.description: A quick overview of recent projects.

signIn.title: Please sign in to access Studio

unauthorized.message: You are not an admin account.

preview.banner: This is a preview. The post is not published.

giscus.notConfigured: Giscus is not configured. Please set NEXT_PUBLIC_GISCUS_REPO, NEXT_PUBLIC_GISCUS_REPO_ID, NEXT_PUBLIC_GISCUS_CATEGORY, NEXT_PUBLIC_GISCUS_CATEGORY_ID.

chatbot.title: Blog Q&A
chatbot.subtitle: Depending on the question, preparing an answer can take up to 30 seconds.
chatbot.emptyTitle: Ask a question and it will look for the most relevant posts first.
chatbot.emptyDescription: Example: Why is staleTime important in React Query?
chatbot.sending: Looking through related posts and drafting an answer...

errors.request_failed: Something went wrong while loading a response. Please try again shortly.

refusal.insufficient_search_match: It could not find enough matching posts yet. Try asking in a slightly different way and it will look again.
refusal.insufficient_evidence: The posts it found were not quite enough to answer confidently. Adding a keyword, technology name, or post title may help.
refusal.invalid_citations: There was an issue while validating the supporting sources, so the answer was skipped this time.
refusal.missing_api_key: The chatbot is not fully configured yet. Please try again later.
refusal.model_error: Something went wrong while drafting the answer. Please try again in a moment.
refusal.question_too_long: Please keep your question within 200 characters so it can search more accurately.
refusal.daily_limit_exceeded: The free daily question limit for today (Korean time) has been reached. Please try again after midnight Korean time.

imageDialog.slugInfo: Slug is empty, so the image will be placed under /public/posts/.../. It will be automatically remapped after setting the slug.
